mapper.sql: AA.AI_LAB_MST_SEQ , AA.LAB_MST_SEQ , AA.AI_LAB_PARAM , AA.AI_LAB_RES , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM
mapper.insert:
/* com.erns.coching.rnd.mapper.AiLabResDAO.insert */
SELECT nextval('seq_t_ai_lab_res')
INSERT INTO T_AI_LAB_RES ( AI_LAB_MST_SEQ , LAB_MST_SEQ , AI_LAB_PARAM , AI_LAB_RES , RGTR , RGT_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{aiLabMstSeq , jdbcType=INTEGER} , #{labMstSeq , jdbcType=INTEGER} , CAST(#{aiLabParam} AS jsonb) NULL
, CAST(#{aiLabRes} AS jsonb) NULL
, #{rgtr , jdbcType=INTEGER} , now() )
